channel.title: +GA on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +GA on Vishvas's notes

item.title: pAnchAlas in bhAratas
item.description: Source: TW North Paanchala was won by PANDAVAS for Drona and Ashwatthama was made the King whereas South Paanchala was given to Drupada by Drona and it’s Prince was Dhrishtadyumna. There is an interesting point that some may miss when reading this episode: There were originally two separate lineages/dynasties of pāñcalas, one based at ahicchatra in north pāñcala, another at kampilya in south pāñcala; not just two regions. So, what happened?
